case_title: SEARS, ROEBUCK & COMPANY, A NEW YORK CORPORATION vs. MCDANIEL, PETER

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $4,410.61 AS TO DEFENDANT MCDANIEL, PETER
